title: RainApricot  Spawn Notification (for Pixelmon)
description: This mod sends in-game notifications immediately when BOSSes, Legendary Dens, Legendary Pokémon, Master Ball Reward Chests, and wild Shiny Pokémon appear in your Pixelmon world, ensuring you never miss them again!
body:
RainSpawnNotification Mod Introduction

Never miss another rare target again—make your adventures more efficient and customizable!

Core Functionality
RainSpawnNotification is a highly configurable notification tool designed for the Pixelmon mod, crafted for players seeking the ultimate adventure experience. When rare targets appear in your world, the mod sends instant, clear in-game notifications to help you capture every precious moment with precision.

Notified Content
The mod monitors and alerts you to the appearance of these rare elements (all toggleable via config):

Wild Shiny Pokémon: Rare, uniquely glowing individuals—triggering high-visibility alerts the moment they spawn.
Wild Legendary Pokémon: Powerful, lore-rich Pokémon—notifications activate the second they appear.
Wild BOSS Pokémon: Elite, high-difficulty challenges—letting you gather your team for battle instantly.
Legendary Dens: Special nests that spawn Legendary Pokémon—never miss a raid opportunity.
Zygarde Cells & Cores: Key items for Zygarde’s form collection—easily track your progress.
Master Ball Chests: Hidden treasure caches—quickly locate high-value loot.
Notification Features
Precise Location: All notifications include coordinate information, displayed on a new line for easy readability.
Consistent Styling: Features a light green [RainApricot] prefix, paired with vibrant type-specific icons (e.g., ✦ for Shinies, ★ for Legendaries) for clear visual distinction.
Customizable Detection Range: Monitors targets within a configurable radius (10–500 blocks), defaulting to 120 blocks for balanced coverage.
Independent Toggles: Enable/disable notifications for specific categories (e.g., Zygarde Cells, Master Ball Chests) to tailor alerts to your needs.
Lightweight Performance: Triggers notifications only when targets appear, with no impact on game performance.
Use Cases
Automatically track rare Pokémon while exploring—no more regrets over “close calls.”
Quickly share rare target locations in multiplayer—enhancing team coordination.
Essential for collectors: Easily track Zygarde Cells/Cores and hidden chests, reducing redundant exploration.
Optimize server performance by disabling unnecessary notifications.
Summary
RainSpawnNotification gives your Pixelmon adventures more direction and flexibility. Whether you’re chasing Shiny collections, challenging Legendary Pokémon, or hunting for hidden rewards, timely and customizable notifications ensure every exploration is more rewarding!

Fully Configurable: Customize detection range and toggle specific notifications in the configuration file to match your playstyle.

Latest Support: Compatible with Pixelmon 9.3.9 and later versions.

Mod Identifier: [RainApricot]
Compatibility: Please use the latest version of NeoForge for optimal gameplay.![Boos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/718627469d9c88399a5b552af3926a9e9cc26d6e.png)
